title: oncidium isthmi
intro: Oncidium isthmi, also known as the Isthmus Oncidium, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. It is a type of flowering plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Oncidium isthmi include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. Traditionally, Oncidium isthmi has been prepared as a tea or infusion by boiling the roots and leaves in water, or by using it in a tincture or oil form for its medicinal properties.
